sentences.en: Could I get a flat white to take away, please?
sentences.zh: 我可以要一杯外带的澄白咖啡吗？

sentences.en: Sorry, do you have any oat milk?
sentences.zh: 不好意思，请问有燕麦奶吗？

sentences.en: That's grand, thanks very much.
sentences.zh: 太好了，非常感谢。

sentences.en: Hi there, what can I get for you today?
sentences.zh: 你好，今天想喝点什么？
words: what can i get for you

sentences.en: What sizes do you do?
sentences.zh: 你们有哪些杯型？

sentences.en: I'll have a medium latte, please.
sentences.zh: 我要一杯中杯拿铁，谢谢

sentences.en: Could I get it decaf, please?
sentences.zh: 可以帮我做成低咖啡因的吗？

sentences.en: Could I get an extra shot of espresso?
sentences.zh: 可以加一份浓缩咖啡吗？

sentences.en: No sugar for me, thanks.
sentences.zh: 我不要加糖，谢谢。

sentences.en: Do you do almond milk as well?
sentences.zh: 你们也有杏仁奶吗？

sentences.en: Sorry, I'm actually allergic to nuts — is that safe?
sentences.zh: 不好意思，我对坚果过敏——这个安全吗？

sentences.en: Could I also grab a slice of carrot cake?
sentences.zh: 我可以再要一块胡萝卜蛋糕吗？

sentences.en: Is that for here or to go?
sentences.zh: 是在这里用还是带走？

sentences.en: To go, please.
sentences.zh: 带走，谢谢。

sentences.en: Do you take card, or is it cash only?
sentences.zh: 你们可以刷卡吗，还是只收现金？

sentences.en: Contactless is fine, isn't it?
sentences.zh: 用非接触支付可以吧？

sentences.en: That'll be £4.50 altogether.
sentences.zh: 一共是4.50英镑。

sentences.en: I'll just pop it on the counter for you.
sentences.zh: 我会把它放在柜台上给你。

sentences.en: Give us two minutes and I'll call your name.
sentences.zh: 给我们两分钟，我会叫你的名字。

sentences.en: Sorry, I think this is the wrong order.
sentences.zh: 不好意思，我觉得这个点错了。

sentences.en: No worries, I'll sort that out for you.
sentences.zh: 没关系，我马上帮你处理。

sentences.en: Cheers, have a good one!
sentences.zh: 谢谢，祝你愉快！

sentences.en: Excuse me, is this the right way to the station?
sentences.zh: 打扰一下，请问这条路是去车站的吗？

sentences.en: It's just round the corner, you can't miss it.
sentences.zh: 就在拐角处，你一定能找到。

sentences.en: Hiya, are you one of my new flatmates?
sentences.zh: 嗨，你是我的新室友吗？

sentences.en: The kitchen's a bit of a state, sorry about that.
sentences.zh: 厨房有点乱，不好意思。

sentences.en: Nice one, I'm just moving in next door.
sentences.zh: 太好了，我就搬到隔壁。

sentences.en: Give us a shout if you need a hand with your bags.
sentences.zh: 如果搬东西需要帮忙，叫我一声就行。

sentences.en: Where are you from, then?
sentences.zh: 那你是哪里人呀？

sentences.en: Whose mug is this on the side?
sentences.zh: 台面上这个杯子是谁的？

sentences.en: Feel free to use the hob, just give it a wipe after.
sentences.zh: 你可以随便用炉子，用完擦一下就行。

sentences.en: Fancy a cuppa while the kettle's on?
sentences.zh: 水壶烧着呢，要不要来杯茶？

sentences.en: I'll stick my name on my food in the fridge, if that's alright.
sentences.zh: 我把名字贴在冰箱里的食物上，可以吧？

sentences.en: Whose turn is it to do the washing up?
sentences.zh: 这次轮到谁洗碗了？

sentences.en: We should sort out a cleaning rota, to be fair.
sentences.zh: 说真的，我们应该搞个打扫轮值表。

sentences.en: Don't forget your bit of the electric bill's due Friday.
sentences.zh: 别忘了你那份电费周五要交。

sentences.en: Have you got a spare charger I could borrow?
sentences.zh: 你有多余的充电器可以借我吗？

sentences.en: Course, help yourself, it's on my desk.
sentences.zh: 当然可以，自己拿吧，就在我桌上。

sentences.en: Sorry, was I too loud last night?
sentences.zh: 不好意思，我昨晚是不是太吵了？

sentences.en: No worries, just keep it down after midnight if you can.
sentences.zh: 没事，可以的话午夜后小声点就行。

sentences.en: Is it alright if a mate comes round later?
sentences.zh: 等下朋友过来方便吗？

sentences.en: Course, the more the merrier.
sentences.zh: 当然，人越多越热闹。

sentences.en: Have you nabbed a washing machine slot?
sentences.zh: 你抢到洗衣机的使用时段了吗？

sentences.en: It's proper busy on a Sunday, so get in early.
sentences.zh: 周日特别抢手，早点去占。

sentences.en: The radiator in my room's on the blink.
sentences.zh: 我房间的暖气坏了。

sentences.en: I'll pop a ticket in with maintenance for you.
sentences.zh: 我帮你跟维修部报修一下。
